title: Progress security advisory (AV26-410)
description: On April 30, 2026, Progress published security advisories to address critical vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Progress MOVEit Automation  version 2025.1.4 and prior
Progress MOVEit Automation  version 2025.0.8 and prior
Progress MOVEit Automation  version 2024.1.7 and prior
Progress MOVEit Automation  version 2024.0.0 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
